entries.source: Reading knowledge plus formal speech routines
entries.value: Aqoonta akhriska oo lagu daray hababka hadalka rasmiga ah
Ma diyaar u tahay hubin 10-daqiiqo ah
Xasuuso ka hor inta aadan muujin
Nabarradii siyaasadeed ee dhawaa ayaa weli ah kuwo cusub

entries.source: Recognition is useful, but it is weaker evidence than applying the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Aqoonsigu waa mid waxtar leh, laakiin waa caddayn ka daciifsan marka loo eego adeegsiga fikradda adigoon haysan jawaabta hortada.

entries.source: Recommend opening questions for this encounter, grouped by interview, debate, contradiction, and legacy.
entries.value: Soo jeedi su'aalo furitaan ah oo loogu talagalay kulankan, kuwaas oo loo kala qaybiyay waraysi, dood, iska horimaad, iyo dhaxal.

entries.source: Reconstruct a decision, alternatives, constraints, and outcomes.
entries.value: Dib-u-dhis go'aan, beddelaad, caqabado, iyo natiijooyin.

entries.source: Red sandstone heat, ink, perfumed paper, controlled silence, and many languages orbiting power.
entries.value: Kulaylka dhagaxa cas, khad, warqad udgoon, aamusnaan la xakameeyey, iyo luuqado badan oo ku wareegsan awoodda.

entries.source: Reframe my next question as a student trying to understand the mental model, not just the biography.
entries.value: Dib u habee su'aashayda xigta anigoo ah arday isku dayaya inuu fahmo qaabka maskaxeed, ee ma aha oo kaliya taariikh nololeedka.
Doodda diiniga ah waa mid siyaasadaysan
Luuqadda diiniga ah waxay u baahan tahay taxadar

entries.source: Remove weak, generic, or low-fit ideas quickly.
entries.value: Si dhakhso ah uga saar fikradaha daciifka ah, guud, ama aan ku habboonayn.

entries.source: Removes the failing path instead of understanding it.
entries.value: Waxay meesha ka saartaa dariiqa fashilmay halkii ay ka fahmi lahayd.
U beddel magaca doorsoomaha meel kasta.

entries.source: Repairing the misconception makes the next problem easier instead of just more familiar.
entries.value: Hagaajinta fikradda khaldan waxay ka dhigaysaa dhibaatada xigta mid fudud halkii ay ka ahaan lahayd mid la yaqaan oo kaliya.

entries.source: Repeating a definition without applying it can feel fluent while hiding gaps.
entries.value: Ku celcelinta qeexitaan adigoon adeegsan waxay dareensiin kartaa in si habsami leh loo yaqaan iyadoo la qarinayo farqiga.

entries.source: Rephrase the active question in simpler language. Ask only one question.
entries.value: Dib u habee su'aasha firfircoon luuqad fudud. Weydii hal su'aal oo kaliya.

entries.source: Reset the controls, move only one slider, and describe the before-and-after in plain language.
entries.value: Dib u deji kontaroolada, dhaqaaji hal slider oo kaliya, oo ku sharax ka hor iyo ka dib luuqad cad.

entries.source: Resolve the event clock before opening the world
entries.value: Xallinta saacadda dhacdada ka hor inta aan la furin dunida

entries.source: Restaurants and drivers can be suppliers, but this specific clue is about customers comparing and switching.
entries.value: Maqaayadaha iyo darawalada waxay noqon karaan alaab-qeybiyeyaal, laakiin tilmaantan gaarka ah waxay ku saabsan tahay macaamiisha isbarbardhigaya oo beddelaya.

entries.source: Restoration London faces plague memory, dense timber housing, and a fire that will reshape the city.
entries.value: London-tii dib-u-dhiska waxay wajahaysaa xusuusta daacuunka, guryo alwaax ah oo cufan, iyo dab dib u qaabayn doona magaalada.

entries.source: Reveal the starting model before the lesson explains it.
entries.value: Muuji qaabka bilowga ah ka hor inta aan casharku sharxin.

entries.source: Rewrite the current rough section as a suggested edit. Show what changed and why before asking me to merge it.
entries.value: Dib u qor qaybta qabyada ah ee hadda jirta sida tafatir la soo jeediyay. Muuji waxa isbeddelay iyo sababta ka hor intaadan i weydiin inaan isku daro.

entries.source: Right. Transfer to a fresh example is stronger evidence than recognition.
entries.value: Sax. U wareejinta tusaale cusub waa caddayn ka xoog badan aqoonsiga.

entries.source: Right. You identified a seller-side cost shock and predicted the pressure on price.
entries.value: Sax. Waxaad aqoonsatay naxdin kharashka dhinaca iibiyaha waxaadna saadaalisay cadaadiska qiimaha.

entries.source: Roman trade used amphorae and contracts
entries.value: Ganacsiga Roomaanku wuxuu isticmaali jiray weelasha dhoobada ah iyo qandaraasyada
Xanta waxay u rogi kartaa dadka dibadda ka yimid
Xanta ku saabsan ciidamada boqortooyada ayaa faaftay

entries.source: Rumors move faster than verified news
entries.value: Xanta ayaa si dhakhso leh u socota marka loo eego wararka la xaqiijiyay

entries.source: Rupees, silver coin, credit through trusted households
entries.value: Rupees, qadaadiic lacag ah, deyn lagu helo qoysas la aamini karo

entries.source: Safe, explanatory, and easier to pause for context.
entries.value: Ammaan, sharraxaad leh, oo fudud in la hakiyo si loo helo macnaha guud.

entries.source: Safer, more explanatory, and allowed to ask modern comparisons.
entries.value: Ammaan badan, sharraxaad badan, oo loo oggolaaday in la weydiiyo isbarbardhigga casriga ah.

entries.source: Salt air, olive oil, rope fiber, shouted accounts, and the heavy logistics behind imperial abundance.
entries.value: Hawada cusbada leh, saliidda saytuunka, xadhigga fiber-ka, xisaabaadka la qayliyey, iyo saadka culus ee ka dambeeya badnaanta boqortooyada.

entries.source: Salt March strategist, St. Helena retrospective, 1946 committee room...
entries.value: Istaraatiijiyaha Salt March, dib-u-eegista St. Helena, qolka guddiga 1946...
Meesha la gaaray ee la keydiyay

entries.source: Say why the mistake is tempting, then name the missing link.
entries.value: Sheeg sababta qaladku u yahay mid la isku hallayn karo, ka dibna magacow xiriirka maqan.

entries.source: Saying revenue is up, so the company is worth more ignores margins, reinvestment, working capital, and risk.
entries.value: In la yiraahdo dakhligu wuu kordhay, markaa shirkaddu waxay u qalantaa wax ka badan, waxay iska indho-tiraysaa faa'iidada, dib-u-maalgashiga, raasumaalka shaqada, iyo khatarta.
Sayniska, hoggaaminta, dimuqraadiyadda, nolosha maalinlaha ah...

entries.source: Seeing the output change but not naming the mechanism.
entries.value: In la arko wax soo saarka oo isbeddelaya laakiin aan la magacaabin habka.

entries.source: Set a place, period, and mission. Your guide will keep the trip bounded to the era and mark speculation clearly.
entries.value: Deji meel, xilli, iyo hawlgal. Hagahaagu wuxuu safarka ku xaddidi doonaa xilligaas wuxuuna si cad u calaamadin doonaa mala-awaalka.

entries.source: Set a thinking target and I will ask the first diagnostic question.
entries.value: Deji yoolka fikirka, waxaana ku weydiin doonaa su'aasha ugu horreysa ee ogaanshaha.

entries.source: Several locations, figures, artifacts, and field notes.
entries.value: Dhowr goobood, tirooyin, agab, iyo qoraallo goobta ah.
Maraakiibtu waxay dajiyaan hadhuudh iyo saliid

entries.source: Short factual notes clarify uncertainty, bias, and interpretation.
entries.value: Qoraallo gaagaaban oo xaqiiqo ah ayaa caddeeya hubanti la'aanta, eexda, iyo tafsiirka.

entries.source: Short summaries keep both sides aligned before moving on.
entries.value: Soo koobid gaagaaban ayaa labada dhinacba ka dhigaysa kuwo isku raacsan ka hor inta aan la sii wadin.

entries.source: Should a company enter this market?
entries.value: Ma shirkaddu waa inay gashaa suuqan?
Muuji kiis la mid ah oo la xalliyay.
Muuji isbeddellada ka hor inta aan la isku darin

entries.source: Show more uncertainty, anachronism, and source-boundary notes.
entries.value: Muuji hubanti la'aan badan, taariikh khaldan, iyo qoraallada xadka ilaha.

entries.source: Show the person's major beliefs at this time, their blind spots, and what they would likely resist understanding.
entries.value: Muuji caqiidooyinka waaweyn ee qofka wakhtigan, meelaha ay ka indho-la'yihiin, iyo waxa ay u badan tahay inay iska caabiyaan fahamkooda.

entries.source: Sketch the outline, sections, or table before polishing language.
entries.value: Sawir dulucda, qaybaha, ama miiska ka hor inta aanad hagaajin luqadda.

entries.source: Small nudges arrive before direct explanations.
entries.value: Tilmaamo yaryar ayaa yimaada ka hor sharraxaadaha tooska ah.

entries.source: Small reserve in local coin or credit
entries.value: Kayd yar oo lacagta maxalliga ah amaah ah
Kayd yar oo lacag ama naxaas ah

entries.source: Socrates was tried and executed in 399 BCE
entries.value: Suqraat waa la maxkamadeeyay waxaana la dilay 399 BCE
Sogdian ka mid ah qaar ka mid ah ganacsatada

entries.source: someone who changed education and faced serious opposition
entries.value: qof wax ka beddelay waxbarashada oo wajahay mucaaradad adag

entries.source: Sources, confidence, uncertainty, and forbidden quotes.
entries.value: Ilaha, kalsoonida, hubin la'aanta, iyo xigashooyinka la mamnuucay.
Sahaminta hawada sare, taariikhda Hindiya, aljabra...
Ujeeddo gaar ah oo ka timid ka qaybgalayaal aan la magacaabin
Isbarbardhigga qiimaha gaarka ah way kala duwan yihiin

entries.source: Specific prices vary by evidence and period
entries.value: Qiimaha gaarka ah wuu ku kala duwan yahay caddaynta iyo muddada

entries.source: Specific private opinions of unnamed residents
entries.value: Fikradaha gaarka ah ee dadka deggan aan la magacaabin

entries.source: Split work into AI-owned, user-owned, and shared moves.
entries.value: U qaybi shaqada dhaqdhaqaaqyo AI-leeyahay, isticmaale-leeyahay, iyo kuwa la wadaago.
Kaniisadda St Paul's Cathedral waa la burburiyay

entries.source: Stage the person, year, room, and relationship.
entries.value: Deji qofka, sannadka, qolka, iyo xiriirka.

entries.source: Standing idle with strange questions during a disaster invites suspicion.
entries.value: Inaad si aan micno lahayn u taagnaato adigoo weydiinaya su'aalo qariib ah inta lagu jiro masiibo waxay kicinaysaa shaki.

entries.source: Start a Time Travel expedition. Do not open a generic chat and do not write a broad period summary.
entries.value: Bilow safar waqti-socod ah. Ha furin sheeko guud hana qorin kooban oo ballaaran oo ku saabsan xilliga.

entries.source: Start with a concept, case, argument, decision, or text.
entries.value: Ku bilow fikrad, kiis, dood, go'aan, ama qoraal.

entries.source: Start with a question, not a lecture.
entries.value: Ku bilow su'aal, ee ha ku bilaabin muxaadaro.

entries.source: Start with a tiny lesson, one check question, a mastery meter, and wait for my answer before continuing.
entries.value: Ku bilow cashar yar, hal su'aal oo hubin ah, mitirka xirfad-sarraynta, oo sug jawaabtayda ka hor inta aadan sii wadin.

entries.source: Start with an era passport, a vivid arrival scene, three choices for what to do next, and a compact timeline log.
entries.value: Ku bilow baasaboorka xilliga, goob imaatin oo cad, saddex doorasho oo ku saabsan waxa xiga ee la samaynayo, iyo diiwaanka waqtiga oo kooban.

entries.source: Start with one specific question or task.
entries.value: Ku bilow hal su'aal ama hawl gaar ah.

entries.source: State the idea in one sentence so it can be tested.
entries.value: Sheeg fikradda hal jumlad si loo tijaabiyo.

entries.source: State your starting idea so the tutor has something to test.
entries.value: Sheeg fikraddaada bilowga ah si macallinku u yeesho wax uu tijaabiyo.

entries.source: Stateful exploration with consequences and evolving risk.
entries.value: Sahamin leh natiijooyin iyo khatar sii kordhaysa.

entries.source: Step by step, brainstorm first, solve together...
entries.value: Tallaabo tallaabo, marka hore maskax-furid, wada xallin...

entries.source: Step out of character briefly. Explain the historical context, evidence quality, and uncertainties behind the last exchange.
entries.value: Si kooban uga bax doorkaaga. Sharax xaaladda taariikhiga ah, tayada caddaynta, iyo hubanti la'aanta ka dambaysa wada-hadalkii ugu dambeeyay.

entries.source: Stone dust, wool dye, bells, and sharp political glances under a crowded square.
entries.value: Siigada dhagaxa, midabka dhogorta, gambaleelka, iyo muuqaallo siyaasadeed oo fiiqan oo ka dhex jira fagaare dadku ku badan yihiin.

entries.source: Stop editing directly for this turn. Give concise advice and one practical next move.
entries.value: Jooji tafatirka tooska ah ee wareeggan. Bixi talo kooban iyo hal tallaabo oo wax ku ool ah oo xiga.

entries.source: Stopped. Send another message whenever you are ready.
entries.value: Waa la joojiyay. Dir farriin kale mar kasta oo aad diyaar u tahay.

entries.source: Strict mode keeps modern knowledge out of the world and applies social consequences sooner.
entries.value: Habka adag wuxuu ka fogeeyaa aqoonta casriga ah adduunka wuxuuna si degdeg ah u dabaqaa cawaaqibka bulshada.

entries.source: Strong writing is a chain of claim, reason, evidence, and consequence. Each sentence should do a job in that chain.
entries.value: Qoraalka xooggan waa silsilad ka kooban sheegasho, sabab, caddayn, iyo cawaaqib. Jumlad kastaa waa inay shaqo ka qabataa silsiladdaas.

entries.source: Substitutes are alternatives like cooking or pickup. Comparing apps is buyer leverage inside the category.
entries.value: Beddelku waa waxyaabo kale sida cunto karinta ama qaadashada. Isbarbardhigga abka waa awoodda iibsadaha ee gudaha qaybta.

entries.source: Suggest candidates with strong evidence and vivid settings.
entries.value: Soo jeedi musharrixiin leh caddayn xooggan iyo goobo cad.

entries.source: Supply shifts left and price tends to rise.
entries.value: Sahaydu waxay u wareegtaa bidix qiimahuna wuxuu u janjeeraa inuu kaco.

entries.source: Take the first pass on the shared artifact. Make the structure visible, mark assumptions, and ask me to accept, edit, or reject.
entries.value: Qaado tallaabada ugu horreysa ee shayga la wadaago. Ka dhig qaab-dhismeedka mid muuqda, calaamadee malo-awaalka, oo i weydii inaan aqbalo, wax ka beddelo, ama diido.

entries.source: Tang Chang'an is a cosmopolitan imperial capital linked to steppe, Central Asian, and Buddhist networks.
entries.value: Tang Chang'an waa caasimad boqortooyo oo caalami ah oo ku xiran shabakadaha steppe, Bartamaha Aasiya, iyo Buddhist.
Boqortooyadii Tang oo hoos timaada Boqor Xuanzong

entries.source: Target: one sentence describing the learning target.
entries.value: Bartilmaameed: hal jumlad oo sharxaysa bartilmaameedka waxbarasho.
I bar Shanta Ciidan ee Porter

entries.source: That catches the revenue movement, but misses the margin and cash timing links. Sales alone do not prove cash flow improved.
entries.value: Taasi waxay qabataa dhaqdhaqaaqa dakhliga, laakiin waxay seegtaa xiriirka margin-ka iyo wakhtiga lacagta caddaanka ah. Iibka oo kaliya ma caddaynayo in qulqulka lacagta caddaanka ah uu soo hagaagay.

entries.source: That may hide the symptom, but it does not teach you where the data flow broke.
entries.value: Taasi waxay laga yaabaa inay qarsato calaamadda, laakiin kuma barayso meesha uu qulqulka xogtu ka jabay.

entries.source: The assistant must identify known facts before simulating
entries.value: Kaaliyuhu waa inuu aqoonsadaa xaqiiqooyinka la yaqaan ka hor inta uusan jilin

entries.source: The Athenian agora was a civic center
entries.value: Agora-ha Atene wuxuu ahaa xarun madani ah

entries.source: The explanation that links evidence back to the claim.
The final summary waits until you have done real thinking.
entries.value: Soo koobidda ugu dambeysa waxay sugaysaa ilaa aad ka samayso fikir dhab ah.

entries.source: The first scene should become concrete only after the destination is resolved.
entries.value: Muuqaalka koowaad waa inuu noqdaa mid la taaban karo oo kaliya ka dib marka meesha loo socdo la xalliyo.

entries.source: The Indian Rebellion of 1857 has made Delhi a contested imperial and military space.
entries.value: Mucaaradkii Hindiya ee 1857 wuxuu Delhi ka dhigay meel boqortooyo iyo militari oo lagu muransan yahay.

entries.source: The learner can connect a variable change to an outcome.
entries.value: Baruhu wuxuu ku xiriirin karaa isbeddelka doorsoomaha natiijada.

entries.source: The learner can explain the key link in their own words.
entries.value: Bartehu waxa uu ku sharxi karaa xidhiidhka muhiimka ah ereyadiisa.

entries.source: The learner can identify and fix the misconception.
entries.value: Bartehu waxa uu aqoonsan karaa oo sixi karaa fikradda khaldan.

entries.source: The learner can make a first prediction.
entries.value: Bartehu waxa uu samayn karaa saadaalinta ugu horreysa.

entries.source: The learner explains it back in their own words.
entries.value: Bartehu waxa uu dib u sharxayaa ereyadiisa.

entries.source: The longest sentence, because shorter is always stronger.
entries.value: Jumlada ugu dheer, sababtoo ah midda gaaban ayaa had iyo jeer ka xoog badan.

entries.source: The person should not know future events unless you explicitly open modern confrontation.
entries.value: Qofku waa inuusan ogaan dhacdooyinka mustaqbalka ilaa aad si cad u furto iska horimaad casri ah.

entries.source: The Roman Empire under Trajan's final year depends on ports, credit, labor, and imperial logistics.
entries.value: Boqortooyadii Roomaanka ee sannadkii ugu dambeeyay ee Trajan waxay ku xiran tahay dekedaha, amaahda, shaqada, iyo saadka boqortooyada.

entries.source: The scene is being established by the dossier.
The simulation will prioritize different people, risks, objects, and explanations.
entries.value: Jiliddu waxay mudnaanta siin doontaa dad kala duwan, khataro, walxo, iyo sharraxaadyo.

entries.source: The title, because every weak paragraph has a weak title.
entries.value: Cinwaanka, sababtoo ah cutub kasta oo daciif ah wuxuu leeyahay cinwaan daciif ah.

entries.source: The Travel Designer should resolve this intent into a specific historical place, date, and political moment before arrival.
entries.value: Naqshadeeyaha Safarku waa inuu ujeeddadan u beddelaa meel taariikhi ah oo gaar ah, taariikh, iyo wakhti siyaasadeed ka hor inta aan la iman.

entries.source: The version of a person matters more than the name.
entries.value: Nooca qofku wuxuu ka muhiimsan yahay magaca.

entries.source: The West Market hosted long-distance trade
entries.value: Suuqa Galbeedku wuxuu martigeliyay ganacsiga fog-fog

entries.source: This is the evidence checkpoint. You advance only by showing the skill.
entries.value: Kani waa barta hubinta caddaynta. Waxaad horumaraysaa oo kaliya adigoo muujinaya xirfadda.

entries.source: This lets you explain why a model moves instead of just copying formulas.
entries.value: Tani waxay kuu ogolaanaysaa inaad sharaxdo sababta qaabku u dhaqaaqo halkii aad ka koobi lahayd qaababka.
Qaybta wakhtiga ayaa loo baahan yahay

entries.source: Time slice: not chosen yet. If a specific person is named, offer 4 to 5 historically meaningful versions of this person before any in-character dialogue. Explain how each version changes the worldview, stakes, and setting.
entries.value: Qaybta wakhtiga: weli lama dooran. Haddii qof gaar ah la magacaabo, bixi 4 ilaa 5 nooc oo taariikhi ah oo macno leh oo qofkan ah ka hor wada hadal kasta oo jilaa ah. Sharax sida nooc kastaa u beddelo aragtida adduunka, khatarta, iyo goobta.

entries.source: Titles matter, but this clue points to reasoning inside the paragraph.
entries.value: Cinwaannadu waa muhiim, laakiin tilmaantan waxay tilmaamaysaa sababaynta ku dhex jirta cutubka.

entries.source: Trace a trade route on the map
entries.value: Raad raac dariiqa ganacsiga ee khariidadda

entries.source: trace cause and effect in code
entries.value: raad raac sababta iyo saamaynta koodhka

entries.source: Track accepted changes, rejected changes, and the next edit.
entries.value: La soco isbeddellada la aqbalay, isbeddellada la diiday, iyo tifaftirka xiga.

entries.source: Track decisions and open questions. Preserve my voice in writing tasks. Ask at most one practical question if context is missing.
entries.value: La soco go'aamada iyo su'aalaha furan. Ilaali codkayga hawlaha qoraalka. Weydii ugu badnaan hal su'aal oo wax ku ool ah haddii macluumaadku maqan yahay.
Erayada ganacsiga oo lagu daray ereyada guriga
